headline: Cencora, Inc. (COR) Signs Binding Agreement to Expand Retina Network With EyeSouth Acquisition
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 13 Best Stocks to Invest In on Robinhood for Beginners. Cencora, Inc. is the next best Robinhood stock on this list. TheFly reported on March 23 that COR revealed that it has signed a binding agreement to acquire the retina division of EyeSouth Partners for $1.1 billion. Once the […]
